items.title: Scott Horton: The Case Against War and the Military Industrial Complex | Lex Fridman Podcast #478
items.author: Lex Fridman
items.content:
<article>Scott Horton is the director of the Libertarian Institute, editorial director of Antiwar.com, host of The Scott Horton Show, co-host of Provoked, and for the past three decades a staunch critic of U.S. military interventionism.
Thank you for listening ❤ Check out our sponsors: https://lexfridman.com/sponsors/ep478-sb
See below for timestamps, and to give feedback, submit questions, contact Lex, etc.

*Other* - other ways to get in touch: https://lexfridman.com/contact

Scott's Website: https://scotthorton.org/
Scott's Books: https://amzn.to/3T9Qg7y

items.title: Keyu Jin: China's Economy, Tariffs, Trade, Trump, Communism & Capitalism | Lex Fridman Podcast #477
items.author: Lex Fridman
items.content:
<article>Keyu Jin is an economist specializing in China's economy, international macroeconomics, global trade imbalances, and financial policy. She is the author of The New China Playbook: Beyond Socialism and Capitalism.
